name: Spacedrift
title: Full-Stack Engineer · AI Systems Architect · Creative Technologist
subtitle: Building intelligent, beautiful systems at the intersection of AI and user experience
bio: Full-stack engineer and AI systems architect specializing in building intelligent, interactive web experiences. Passionate about combining cutting-edge AI with thoughtful design to create systems that feel alive. Experienced in React, Next.js, LLM orchestration, vector databases, and cinematic web animation.
